experience_summary: Track record of growing organic traffic and managing multi-channel campaigns that consistently exceed ROI targets.
full_text:
Priya Nair
 Mumbai, Maharashtra, India | +91 99887 76655 | priya.nair.marketing@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/priyanair-digital
PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY
Results-driven Digital Marketing Specialist with 4 years of experience in SEO, paid media, and content strategy.
Track record of growing organic traffic and managing multi-channel campaigns that consistently exceed ROI targets.
SKILLS
SEO / SEM
Google Ads
Meta Ads Manager
Google Analytics 4
Content Strategy
Email Marketing (HubSpot)
Social Media Management
Marketing Automation
A/B Testing
Canva / Adobe Creative Suite
WordPress
Keyword Research
Conversion Rate Optimization
Brand Strategy
Influencer Marketing
WORK EXPERIENCE
Digital Marketing Manager — Bloom & Co. Brand Studio
Mumbai, India | Apr 2023 – Present
 Grew organic website traffic by 65% year-over-year through technical SEO and content overhaul.
 Managed a monthly paid media budget of ■12 lakh across Google Ads and Meta, achieving 4.2x ROAS.
 Led a rebranding campaign that increased social media engagement by 80% within 3 months.
 Built and optimized email nurture flows in HubSpot, lifting email-driven revenue by 30%.
SEO & Content Executive — Clicktide Digital Agency
Pune, India | Jul 2021 – Mar 2023
 Executed on-page and off-page SEO strategies for 10+ client accounts across industries.
 Increased average client keyword rankings to page 1 for 70% of tracked terms within 6 months.
 Produced content calendars and blog content that improved average session duration by 22%.
EDUCATION
MBA in Marketing
NMIMS, Mumbai | 2019 – 2021
B.Com
University of Mumbai | 2016 – 2019
CERTIFICATIONS
 Google Ads Search Certification (2024)
 HubSpot Content Marketing Certification (2022)
